Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-19-2024 Text Ruling

Appearances:
Peter K. Renstrom, Esq., GOLDBERG SEGALLA LLP 415-432-6600 prenstrom@goldbergsegalla.com
Defendant Walmart Inc

Matter is not contested. No argument is held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Order and Judgment are signed.
